deck_goal: Self-authored structural proxy baseline deck for teaching hackathon finalists a short pitch structure.

sessions.summary: Frozen baseline fixture converted into renderable slide specs for A/B comparison.

slide_reviews.note: Judging criteria are present but not deeply routed into the whole deck.
Backup proof is mentioned, but the demo route is not made visual.

recurring_issues: The deck is coherent but generic.
The rubric appears as one slide instead of driving every slide choice.
Visual aids do not carry much explanatory weight.
new_rules: Use this baseline only as a structural regression fixture; replace it with captured one-shot model output for model-specific studies.
